info.name: CHRGE API
info.description:
CHRGE Backend API — EV Charging Station Platform.

**Quick start:**
1. Run Register, Login, or Google Login — tokens are saved automatically.
2. All authenticated requests use `{{accessToken}}` from the collection variable.
3. Use `{{refreshToken}}` to rotate tokens silently.

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`

item.name: Auth
item.description: Register, login, Google OAuth, token refresh and logout.

request.description: Create a new account with email + password. `firstName` and `lastName` are optional — great for low-friction sign-up. Returns `isNewUser: true` so the frontend can route to onboarding.

response.name: 201 Created — new account
response.body:
{
  "user": {
    "id": "cm8abc123",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "avatarUrl": null,
    "provider": "EMAIL",
    "emailVerified": false,
    "role": "USER",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-18T10:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "refreshToken": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "isNewUser": true
}

request.description: Sign in with email + password. Returns `isNewUser: false` for existing accounts.

response.name: 200 OK — existing account
response.body:
{
  "user": {
    "id": "cm8abc123",
    "email": "test@chrge.ng",
    "firstName": "Test",
    "lastName": "User",
    "avatarUrl": null,
    "provider": "EMAIL",
    "emailVerified": false,
    "role": "USER",
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "refreshToken": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "isNewUser": false
}

request.description:
Sign in / sign up with Google. Pass the raw `credential` string from Google Identity Services (e.g. `@react-oauth/google` `onSuccess({ credential })`). The backend verifies it server-side — no OAuth redirect needed.

- New accounts: `isNewUser: true`, name + avatar auto-populated from Google.
- Returning accounts: `isNewUser: false`, name + avatar synced from Google on every login.
- Existing email account: Google is linked automatically.

response.name: 200 OK — new Google user (→ onboarding)
response.body:
{
  "user": {
    "id": "cm8xyz456",
    "email": "jane@gmail.com",
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "avatarUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/...",
    "provider": "GOOGLE",
    "emailVerified": true,
    "role": "USER",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-18T10:05:00.000Z"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "refreshToken": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "isNewUser": true
}

response.name: 200 OK — returning Google user (→ app)
response.body:
{
  "user": {
    "id": "cm8xyz456",
    "email": "jane@gmail.com",
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "avatarUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/...",
    "provider": "GOOGLE",
    "emailVerified": true,
    "role": "USER",
    "createdAt": "2026-01-15T08:30:00.000Z"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "refreshToken": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "isNewUser": false
}

request.description: Rotate tokens silently. Old refresh token is invalidated; new pair is returned. Call this when the access token expires (after `expiresIn` seconds).

response.name: 200 OK — tokens rotated
response.body:
{
  "user": {
    "id": "cm8abc123",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "avatarUrl": null,
    "provider": "EMAIL",
    "emailVerified": false,
    "role": "USER",
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "refreshToken": "b9c8d7e6f5432...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "isNewUser": false
}

request.description: Revoke the current refresh token. Pass `"revokeAll": true` to sign out of all devices.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": "cm8abc123",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "avatarUrl": null,
  "provider": "EMAIL",
  "emailVerified": false,
  "role": "USER",
  "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: All fields are optional. Google users' name/avatar are synced from Google on each login but can be overridden here.
Soft-deletes the account. The user cannot log in after this.

item.name: Vehicles (Public)
item.description: Vehicle brands and models — no auth required. Used for the onboarding vehicle picker.

request.description: Returns all active vehicle brands. `darkLogo: true` means the brand logo needs a dark/light background treatment.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns all active models for a brand. `powertrain` is `BEV`, `PHEV`, or `EREV`. `connectors` is an ordered array — first element is the primary connector for station filtering.

item.name: My Vehicles
item.description: Manage the authenticated user's saved vehicles. The primary vehicle's first connector is used to auto-filter nearby stations.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Add a vehicle by `modelId` (stable string ID from the brands/models endpoints). Set `setPrimary: true` to make it the primary vehicle for station filtering.

item.name: Stations
item.description:
Discover and interact with EV charging stations.

**Station card fields (list endpoints):**
- `area` — neighbourhood/district (e.g. "Victoria Island")
- `lat` / `lng` — coordinates
- `rating` — average star rating (1–5)
- `openingHoursText` — human-readable string ("Open 24/7", "Closes at 22:00", etc.)
- `priceText` — human-readable price ("₦350/kWh", "₦350/kWh + ₦500 session")
- `statusSummary` — `AVAILABLE` | `IN_USE` | `OUT_OF_SERVICE`
- `connectors` — array of `{ type, powerKw, count }` aggregated from ports
- `images` — flat array of image URLs (hero first)

request.description:
Fetch all active stations without needing a location. Sorted by rating (desc) then name. All filters are optional. Auth is optional — pass token to get `isFavorite` status per station.

Use this for a full station list / map view. Use `/stations/nearby` when you have the user's coordinates.

response.name: 200 OK — all stations
response.body:
{
  "stations": [
    {
      "id": "uuid-station-1",
      "name": "CHRGE Lekki Phase 1",

      "area": "Lekki Phase 1",
      "city": "Lagos",
      "lat": 6.4281,
      "lng": 3.4219,
      "heroImageUrl": "https://chrge.ng/stations/lekki-1-main.jpg",
      "images": ["https://chrge.ng/stations/lekki-1-main.jpg"],
      "distanceKm": null,
      "rating": 4.8,
      "reviewCount": 12,
      "isOpenNow": true,
      "openingHoursText": "Open 24/7",
      "priceText": "₦350/kWh + ₦500 session",
      "statusSummary": "AVAILABLE",
      "portsAvailableCount": 4,
      "portsTotalCount": 5,
      "connectors": [
        { "type": "CCS2",  "powerKw": 150, "count": 3 },
        { "type": "TYPE2", "powerKw": 22,  "count": 2 }
      ],
      "amenities": ["restrooms", "wifi", "security"],
      "updatedAt": "2026-02-18T09:00:00.000Z",
      "isFavorite": false
    }

}

query.description: Pagination cursor (offset number from previous response)

request.description: Returns stations within `radiusKm` of the given coordinates, sorted by distance. If the user has a primary vehicle, stations are pre-filtered to matching connector types (unless `connectors` is explicitly provided).

query.description: ISO date string cursor from previous response

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Upsert — creates a new review or updates an existing one for this station. `rating` is 1–5. `comment` is optional.
Saves the station and returns the full station detail with `isFavorite: true`. Use the returned object to update local state — no separate GET needed.

response.name: 200 OK — station with isFavorite: true

request.description: Unsaves the station and returns the full station detail with `isFavorite: false`. Use the returned object to update local state — no separate GET needed.

response.name: 200 OK — station with isFavorite: false

item.name: Station Submissions
item.description: Allows any authenticated user to submit a new charging station and track their submissions. When `SKIP_STATION_APPROVAL=true` (early phase), stations go live immediately. Otherwise they are `PENDING` until an admin approves them.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "My Charging Hub Yaba",
  "description": "Community charging station near Yaba tech cluster",
  "address": "14 Herbert Macaulay Way",
  "area": "Yaba",
  "city": "Lagos",
  "state": "Lagos",
  "country": "NG",
  "latitude": 6.5095,
  "longitude": 3.3711,
  "timezone": "Africa/Lagos",
  "amenities": ["parking", "security"],
  "pricing": { "perKwh": 300, "currency": "NGN" },
  "phoneNumber": "+234 801 234 5678",
  "ports": [
    {
      "connectorType": "TYPE_2",
      "chargerType": "LEVEL2",
      "powerKw": 22,
      "portNumber": "A1",
      "pricePerKwh": 300
    },
    {
      "connectorType": "CCS2",
      "chargerType": "DCFC",
      "powerKw": 50,
      "portNumber": "B1"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Submit a new charging station. Any logged-in user can submit. Include `ports` array to add connectors inline — you can also add them later via the admin ports endpoint.

When `SKIP_STATION_APPROVAL=true` (early phase default), the station is immediately `APPROVED` and `isActive: true`. In production, it starts as `PENDING` and requires admin review.

response.name: 201 Created — station live (SKIP_APPROVAL=true)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid-new-station",
    "name": "My Charging Hub Yaba",
    "address": "14 Herbert Macaulay Way",
    "area": "Yaba",
    "city": "Lagos",
    "state": "Lagos",
    "country": "NG",
    "lat": 6.5095,
    "lng": 3.3711,
    "isActive": true,
    "isVerified": false,
    "status": "APPROVED",
    "submittedBy": "uuid-user",
    "rejectionReason": null,
    "ports": [
      { "id": "uuid-port-1", "connectorType": "TYPE_2", "chargerType": "LEVEL2", "powerKw": 22, "status": "UNKNOWN", "portNumber": "A1" },
      { "id": "uuid-port-2", "connectorType": "CCS2",   "chargerType": "DCFC",   "powerKw": 50, "status": "UNKNOWN", "portNumber": "B1" }
    ],
    "isFavorite": false
  }
}

response.name: 201 Created — station pending (SKIP_APPROVAL=false)

request.description: Returns all stations submitted by the current user, ordered newest first. Each item includes a `status` field (`PENDING`, `APPROVED`, or `REJECTED`) so the user can track their submission.

response.name: 200 OK

        "portsAvailableCount": 0,

          { "type": "CCS2",   "powerKw": 50, "count": 1 }
        ],

        "updatedAt": "2026-02-18T12:00:00.000Z",
        "isFavorite": false,
        "status": "APPROVED"

    ],
    "nextCursor": null
  }
}

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. Requires a JWT with `role: ADMIN`. Use these to manage stations, approve/reject submissions, and manage vehicle data.

request.description:
Approve or reject a user-submitted station. Requires `role: ADMIN`.

- `APPROVE` → sets `isActive: true`, `isVerified: true`, `status: APPROVED`
- `REJECT` → sets `isActive: false`, `status: REJECTED`, stores `rejectionReason`

Example reject body:
```json
{ "action": "REJECT", "rejectionReason": "Location could not be verified" }
```

response.name: 200 OK — approved
200 OK — rejected
